notes: Full 7-eval benchmark: with_skill 96% vs without_skill 21% — Delta +75%
Eval 2 improved from 71% to 100% after complexity hard-rule fix in iteration-2
All with_skill outputs show: 主要矛盾宣告, '我判断' 走向判断, 矛盾重构三问, 时机判断
Without-skill baseline consistently lacks all skill-specific patterns
with_skill uses ~4x more tokens due to SKILL.md + reference file loading
Eval 7 with_skill judged as complex (7 steps) instead of medium — minor over-classification
